overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from inside an Audi driving on a multi-lane highway at night during heavy rain. The windshield wipers are active throughout as the vehicle overtakes multiple cars and trucks while street lights illuminate the wet asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside an Audi as it navigates a rain-soaked highway at night, weaving through a variety of colorful traffic. It begins with the windshield wipers clearing heavy rain as the vehicle overtakes a white sedan beneath a line of street lights. As the car maintains its speed, the camera approaches and passes under a large overhead sign gantry while gliding past a massive white commercial truck. The scene then shifts through moderate traffic, passing a bright green sports car and an orange sedan as a blue directional sign emerges in the distance. Finally, the vehicle overtakes a yellow car and a red sedan, drawing closer to the blue highway sign while the street lights continue to illuminate the wet asphalt through the steady downpour.
